programme.desc: Naruto Shippuden the Movie: The Lost Tower

programme.title: King of New York, (1990, Thriller)
programme.desc: Recently freed from prison, Frank White (Christopher Walken) begins to exterminate the drug lords who rose to power in his absence. When a group of enraged cops declares war on him, Frank's answer is to put a contract out on the cops.

programme.title: State of Grace, (1990, Drama)
programme.desc: In this neo-noir crime film, an undercover cop (Sean Penn) comes back to his old neighborhood in New York City's Hell's Kitchen to bring down the Irish Mafia, which is now led by two of his childhood friends (Gary Oldman and Ed Harris).

programme.title: Original Gangstas, (1996, Action)
programme.desc: A fast-paced Action-Thriller about adults living in a crime-ridden area. The are tired of being bullied, and take matters into their own hands to rid the town of the criminals.

programme.title: The Infiltrator, (2016, Drama)
programme.desc: A U.S. Customs official uncovers a money laundering scheme involving Colombian drug lord Pablo Escobar.

programme.title: Escobar: Paradise Lost, (2015, Drama)
programme.desc: A young surfer, Nick, falls madly in love with a beautiful girl. It all seems perfect until he meets her uncle, the famous drug kingpin Pablo Escobar.

programme.title: A Simple Plan, (1998, Drama)
programme.desc: In a gym bag. That's how three men size up what they've found in the snowy Minnesota woods. They've come across a downed plane with a rotting corpse inside...and over $4 million stuffed inside a duffel bag. Finders, keepers? Maybe.

programme.title: The Boondock Saints, (1999, Thriller)
programme.desc: Two Irish Catholic brothers become vigilantes and wipe out Boston's criminal underworld in the name of God.

programme.title: The Boondock Saints II: All Saints Day, (2009, Action)
programme.desc: The MacManus brothers have been in hiding with their father, Il Duce, in the quiet valleys of Ireland. When word comes that a beloved priest has been killed, the brothers return to Boston to mount a bloody crusade to bring justice to those responsible.

programme.title: Chasing Amy, (1997, Romantic comedy)
programme.desc: Cult comic-book artist Holden falls head-over-heels with fellow artist Alyssa, but, for that love to live, he'll need to contend with his disapproving best friend Banky, her sexuality, and his own misgivings about himself in this Kevin Smith classic.

programme.title: Slacker, (1991, Comedy)
programme.desc: A day in the life of Austin, Texas as the camera roams from place to place and provides a brief look at the overeducated, the social misfits, the outcasts and the oddballs.

programme.title: In a World, (2013, Comedy)
programme.desc: Carol (Lake Bell) is an underachieving voice coach who finds herself competing in the movie trailer voice-over profession against her arrogant father and his protégé.

programme.title: Girl Most Likely, (2012, Drama)
programme.desc: Kristen Wiig stars in this sweet and funny movie about a failed playwright who is forced to move home with her eccentric mother (Annette Bening).

programme.title: Hearts Beat Loud, (2018, Comedy)
programme.desc: A father and daughter form an unlikely songwriting duo in the summer before she leaves for college.

programme.title: Citizen Ruth, (1996, Comedy)
programme.desc: In this outrageous satire, Laura Dern is Ruth Stoops, an irresponsible, care-free drug addict pregnant for the fifth time, horrifying everyone around her. Soon, Ruth's at the forefront of a national debate, when all she wants to do is party.

programme.title: Downsizing, (2017, Drama)
programme.desc: When scientists find a way to shrink humans to five inches tall, Paul and his wife decide to get small and live large in a luxurious downsized community. With endless possibilities in the tiny world, Paul realizes we are meant for something bigger.

programme.title: First Reformed, (2018, Drama)
programme.desc: The pastor (Ethan Hawke) of a small church in upstate New York spirals out of control after a soul-shaking encounter with an unstable environmental activist and his pregnant wife (Amanda Seyfried) in this taut, chilling thriller.

programme.title: Bones And All, (2022, Drama)
programme.desc: In a world that cannot abide who they truly are, a young woman who is learning how to survive on the margins of society and an intense, disenfranchised drifter embark upon a road trip, searching for identity and chasing beauty in a perilous world.

programme.title: Dick, (1999, Drama)
programme.desc: The year is 1972 and Betsy Jobs and Arlene Lorenzo just want to have a good time. But during a class field trip to the White House, they cluelessly wander into a behind-closed-doors, top-secret shredding session. Rating: PG-13

programme.title: Bottle Rocket, (1996, Comedy)
programme.desc: Newcomer Owen Wilson, in a star-making performance, co-wrote the screenplay about three best friends who attempt to escape their suburban boredom through a life of crime.

programme.title: Mo' Money, (1992, Comedy)
programme.desc: You can never be too rich...or too funny. Comedian Damon Wayans brings his rogue's gallery of outrageous characters to this action-filled comedy about a con artist who tries to go straight, but keeps getting pulled in the wrong direction.

programme.title: Swingers, (1996, Comedy)
programme.desc: In this laugh-out-loud indie comedy classic that launched the careers of its outstanding cast, two friends set out to rewrite modern dating from Los Angeles to Las Vegas.

programme.title: Dick, (1999, Drama)
programme.desc: The year is 1972 and Betsy Jobs and Arlene Lorenzo just want to have a good time. But during a class field trip to the White House, they cluelessly wander into a behind-closed-doors, top-secret shredding session. Rating: PG-13

programme.title: Bottle Rocket, (1996, Comedy)
programme.desc: Newcomer Owen Wilson, in a star-making performance, co-wrote the screenplay about three best friends who attempt to escape their suburban boredom through a life of crime.

programme.title: Mo' Money, (1992, Comedy)
programme.desc: You can never be too rich...or too funny. Comedian Damon Wayans brings his rogue's gallery of outrageous characters to this action-filled comedy about a con artist who tries to go straight, but keeps getting pulled in the wrong direction.

programme.title: Hudson Hawk, (1991, Heist Films)
programme.desc: Willis is Eddie "The Hawk" Hawkins, the world's most famous cat burglar, who, after 10 years in prison, is ready to go straight. But it's not going to be easy for The Hawk.

programme.title: The Crow, (1994, Action)
programme.desc: Visually stunning and action-packed, this hit movie, based on the comic book series, follows the return from the grave of a young rock guitarist who, along with his fiancée, is brutally killed by a ruthless gang of criminals.

programme.title: Heaven Can Wait, (1978, Comedy)
programme.desc: Heaven Can Wait is a romantic fantasy about Joe Pendleton, a Los Angeles Rams quarterback who is accidentally summoned to Heaven by an overly zealous celestial escort.

programme.title: The Gambler, (1974, Thriller)
programme.desc: James Caan portrays a compulsive gambler who can't quit or win. He falls into debt to the mob for $40,000 but seems to relish the thrill of gambling against the long shot.

programme.title: Ned Kelly, (1970, Western)
programme.desc: Mick Jagger makes his dynamic screen debut in this explosive tale based on the true-life story of the 19th-century Australian 'Armored Bandit,' who would become a mythic sagebrush hero even as the law closes in and prepares for an all-out war.

programme.title: Dillinger, (1973, Drama)
programme.desc: An account of the notorious gangster, John Dillinger, from midway through his bank-robbing career up until his final shootout outside the Biograph Theatre.

programme.title: Force 10 From Navarone, (1978, Action)
programme.desc: A group of allied commandos on a mission against the 3rd Reich has orders to blow a giant dam in order to crush a strategic bridge held by the Nazis.

programme.title: A Bridge Too Far, (1977, War)
programme.desc: With an all-star cast that includes Sean Connery, Anthony Hopkins, Laurence Olivier, Gene Hackman and Robert Redford, this epic WW II drama recreates Operation Market Garden, an ambitious plan to hasten the end of WW II that ended in disaster.

programme.title: Apocalypse Now: Redux, (2001, Action)
programme.desc: This is the definitive version of Francis Ford Coppola's stunning vision of the heart of darkness in all of us, re-edited and re- mastered with 49 minutes of additional footage.

programme.title: The Eagle Has Landed, (1976, Action)
programme.desc: A German plot to kidnap Winston Churchill unfolds at the height of World War II.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and Kaiba are on a rescue mission to save their friends. But along the way, all their worries and secrets are revealed as they relive the troubles they've faced and will face in the future.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's friend versus friend as Marik mind controls Joey to duel against Yugi. The loser will be dragged into the ocean to sleep with the fishes!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Though Joey decimates Yugi's life points, Yugi can't bring himself to attack his dear friend. Yugi summons Joey's favorite monster Red-Eyes Black Dragon to bring Joey back to his senses.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi starts to break Marik's spell over Joey, but he now must duel without the Millennium Puzzle.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: There's only one minute left in the duel before the loser is sent plummeting to the depths of the sea. Will these best friends actually send each other to their doom?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's the battle of the ghouls as Bakura unleashes his army of ghosts against Bonz's zealous zombies for the right to enter the Battle City finals. But for whom will the final bell toll when this duel is played in the Shadow Realm?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's the game of love as Hollywood heartthrob Jean-Claude Magnum challenges Mai to a duel in order to win her hand in marriage.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Let the Battle City finals begin! The eight finalists have their skill and endurance put to the ultimate test in a dueling arena thousands of feet in the sky.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's the first duel of the Battle City finals as Yugi squares off against the evil spirit of the Millennium Ring who possessed Bakura. Yugi quickly disposes of Bakura's grotesque ghouls, but Bakura has a sinister strategy straight from the graveyard.
programme.sub-title: The Dark Spirit Revealed: Yugi Vs. Bakura Part 1

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Bakura activates Destiny Board, which will cause Yugi to lose automatically in five turns. If that's not bad enough, Bakura's Dark Sanctuary damages Yugi's Life Points every time Yugi attacks. Unable to attack and running out of time, Yugi's trapped.
programme.sub-title: The Dark Spirit Revealed: Yugi Vs. Bakura Part 2

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi's Slifer the Sky Dragon is about to unleash the final blow to win the duel, but Bakura may not survive the blast from the almighty Egyptian God Monster. Will Yugi attack and advance in the finals or will he surrender to save Bakura's life?
programme.sub-title: The Dark Spirit Revealed: Yugi Vs. Bakura Part 3

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The origin of the Egyptian God Cards is finally revealed. The mysterious Shadi takes Yugi on a journey back in time to the creation of Duel Monsters… and the dangerous powers it released.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: In the second duel of the Battle City finals, Odion, disguised as Marik, befuddles Joey with numerous traps to bring the duel to a stalemate. However, Joey has Giant Trunade, the perfect counter to Odion's strategy.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Odion's Embodiments of Apophis run roughshod over Joey's monsters and his Life Points. Can Joey effectively utilize the monsters he won earlier in the tournament, or is he too flustered to mount a successful counterattack?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's a feeding frenzy as Odion's Mystical Beast Selket devours Joey's monsters to morph into greater and powerful stages of evolution! How can Joey defeat Selket when it ingests Joey's monsters whenever they're summoned on to the field?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Odion uses a phony Egyptian God Card to summon the third Egyptian God Monster, The Winged Dragon of Ra, targeted to annihilate the rest of Joey's Life Points.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The third duel of the Battle City finals between Mai and Marik is no ordinary duel; it's a battle in the dreaded Shadow Realm where losing Life Points equals losing your memories.
programme.sub-title: Mind Game Part 1: Mai vs. Marik

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: As Mai loses more memories under Marik's relentless assault, she loses confidence in her dueling abilities. Will Yugi and friends' never-ending support bring her back to victory, or will her shattered mind be trapped in the Shadow Realm for eternity?
programme.sub-title: Mind Game Part 2: Mai vs. Marik

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Mai gains control of Marik's The Winged Dragon of Ra, but she's unable to decipher how to unleash its massively powerful abilities. Can Mai solve the mystery of the Egyptian God Card before Marik solves it himself?
programme.sub-title: Mind Game Part 3: Mai vs. Marik

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: In the fourth duel of the Battle City finals, Kaiba's mystery opponent is Ishizu. With the power of her Millennium Necklace, Ishizu can see the future, including every card Kaiba is planning to play.
programme.sub-title: A Duel with Destiny Part 1: Kaiba vs. Ishizu

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Ishizu, using the magic of her Millennium Necklace, has already seen the outcome of the duel: she will defeat Kaiba with sacrifice's blast! How can Kaiba win when it's predestined that he will lose? Kaiba must change the future!
programme.sub-title: A Duel with Destiny Part 2: Kaiba vs. Ishizu

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: As Marik's evil grows, Ishizu reveals the secrets of her bloodline: How did Marik transform from a kind child into a power-hungry tyrant out for world domination? Can Yugi save Marik from the edge of darkness, or is he already beyond salvation?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: With their previous pact broken, Bakura duels Marik for the right to control the Millennium Rod and Millennium Ring, with the loser being trapped inside the Shadow Realm forever. To tip the odds, Bakura gains an unexpected ally… another Marik?
programme.sub-title: Showdown in the Shadows Part 1: Marik Vs. Bakura

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Bakura and good Marik summon The Winged Dragon of Ra, ready to blast and banish evil Marik into the Shadow Realm. But The Winged Dragon of Ra has more than one special ability, and evil Marik knows how to use them all.
programme.sub-title: Showdown in the Shadows Part 2: Marik Vs. Bakura

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba's blimp is hijacked by a mysterious boy named Noah and his henchmen - five familiar foes from Yugi and Kaiba's past who are out for revenge!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The first to duel under the all-new Deck Master System is Yugi against Big 1 Gansley's Deepsea Warrior! Can Yugi master the complex new rules, or will the rules master him?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: As Yugi struggles to make heads or tails of the Deck Master System, Big 1 uses his Deck Master ability to send all of Yugi's attacks right back! How can Yugi defeat an opponent when his attacks take away his own life points?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi's running out of life points, but can his cute little Deck Master Kuriboh unleash his furry fury to turn the tide of battle?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Prepare for a feathered fight when Téa squares off against Big 2 Crump's Nightmare Penguin where the loser will be trapped forever in a block of ice!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: As Téa's body turns more and more into a giant popsicle, can she keep her brain from freezing to find a way to melt Big 2's strategy? Or will Big 2's penguin horde waddle all over her?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey squares off against the judicial jerk Big 3 Johnson who takes the Deck Master form of Judge Man! How can Joey defeat a foe who can destroy Joey's monsters at will?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Just when Joey seems to gain the upper hand, he hits the longest streak of bad luck in the history of mankind! Has Joey's fortunes finally run out, or is a crooked judge ignoring the rules of the law?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Big 4 Nezbitt challenges Duke, Tristan, and Serenity for the right to gain control of three bodies at once! Will Serenity's errors cost her team the ultimate price when Tristan and Duke can't cover for her mistakes?

programme.title: Luffy and Captain Foxy go toe-to-toe in a brutal battle waged aboard a booby-trapped boat. Luffy is fighting for his crew, but Captain Foxy’s dirty tricks have him on the ropes!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Full-blast slow-slow onslaught vs. Invulnerable luffy

programme.title: Luffy’s epic battle with Captain Foxy reaches its riveting end, and a very old man with a very tall horse reunites with a face from very long ago.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Epic, heated combat! The fateful final conclusion

programme.title: When Luffy and his mates lose their memory, Robin is the only Straw Hat who can remember their adventures together. Can she recover their recollections before the crew splits up?
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Was it lost? Stolen? Who are you?

programme.title: Robin tries to hold the crew together while unraveling the mystery of the missing memories. Meanwhile, Nami and Zoro flashback to painful moments from their pasts.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A mysterious boy with a horn and robin's deduction!

programme.title: The Straw Hats finally discover the culprit behind their memory loss, but they’ve got bigger problems. The mysterious thief is determined to pit Zoro and Luffy against each other!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Now, let's get back our memories! The pirate crew lands on the island!

programme.title: Zoro and Luffy fight to the death, Nami attempts to orchestrate an uprising, and Sanji discovers he’s willing to kick a kid in order to get his memories back!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Zoro bares his fangs! A savage animal stands in the way!

programme.title: The Straw Hats finally regain their memories, but a much larger challenge looms on the horizon. The mysterious thief is about to transform into something even more powerful!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The last counterattack by the memory thief who reveals his true colors!

programme.title: A terrible storm leads to another run in with the devious Captain Foxy! When Luffy makes the dangerous decision to help his old foe, it could spell disaster for the Straw Hats!
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: Luffy and his mates must survive another outrageous battle aboard Captain Foxy’s booby-trapped boat, and even if they survive, something far worse awaits them!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The guy who's the closest to invincible? And the most dangerous man!

programme.title: The Straw Hats take time out to help a group of hungry castaways, but trouble looms on the horizon. An icy marine adversary is out to track down Robin!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Navy headquarters admiral aokiji! The ferocity of an ultimate powerhouse!

programme.title: Chopper and Usopp work feverishly to save Robin from her icy tomb, and Luffy looks to settle the score with Admiral Aokiji in a man-to-man fight to the finish!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Duel between rubber and ice! Luffy vs. Aokiji!

programme.title: An encounter with a giant swimming frog leads to a close call with a seafaring train! Next up for the Straw Hats: drop anchor at a town full of water and seek out a shipwright!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The dashing sea train and the city of water, water seven!

programme.title: Luffy, Usopp, and Nami take a wild ride through Water Seven in search of a shipwright. Meanwhile, Chopper and Robin get separated during their quest to find a bookstore!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Adventure in the city on the water! Head to the mammoth shipbuilding plant!

programme.title: Zoro is attacked by thugs who want to cash in on his bounty, Sanji gets lost on a grocery shopping expedition, and three suitcases full of cash mysteriously go missing!
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: A carpenter and his talking pigeon help recover the Straw Hats’ missing money, but the Franky Family won’t give up so easily. Luffy and Nami receive very bad news about their beloved boat!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Galley-la company! A grand sight: dock #1!

programme.title: Luffy and Nami refuse to believe that the Going Merry’s seaworthy days are finished, but for now, bigger problems loom on the horizon! Their money is missing again, along with Usopp!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Pirate abduction incident! A pirate ship that can only await her end!

programme.title: Usopp bravely tries to recover the stolen money, but the Franky Family has him badly outnumbered. Zoro, Sanji, and Chopper set out on a rescue mission, but they’ll need Luffy to even the odds!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Rescuing our friend! Raid on the franky house!

programme.title: Usopp regains consciousness after his vicious beating, but he’s not at all happy to hear Luffy’s plans for the Going Merry. Temper flares and challenges are issued as the Straw Hats face their most uncertain hour.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Big fight under the moon! The pirate flag flutters with sorrow!

programme.title: Luffy and Usopp battle to a brutal standstill in a heartbreaking duel between men who once called each other family. Can the Straw Hats find the strength to carry on without their sniper?
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Luffy vs. Usopp! Collision of two men's pride!

programme.title: The Straw Hat split is overshadowed by an assassination attempt on the mayor of Water Seven! Luffy is eager to investigate, but the leader of the Franky Family is about to reappear!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Severe shock hits the city of water! Iceberg targeted!

programme.title: Luffy’s grudge match with Franky gets serious when his opponent turns out to be a cyborg! Iceberg awakes from his slumber only to hurl heinous accusations at the Straw Hats!
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: Luffy is branded an assassin and attacked by Iceberg’s strongest men! Meanwhile, Sanji and Chopper attempt to warn Usopp about an impending natural disaster!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The straw hat pirates are the culprits? The protectors of the city of water!

programme.title: The citizens of Water Seven search for the Straw Hats and a devastating storm threatens to sink the city. Chopper and Sanji pick up Robin’s trail, but they aren’t prepared for what they’ll find.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Eternal farewell? Nico robin: the woman who draws darkness!

programme.title: Usopp prepares to ride out the storm aboard the Going Merry, Franky hatches a plan to force Luffy into a rematch, and the Straw Hats set out to uncover Robin’s dark secret.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Capture robin! The determination of the straw hats!

programme.title: Robin and her CP9 brethren seek to settle unfinished business with Iceberg. The Straw Hats have a plan to clear their names, but the assassins are one step ahead of them.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Cannon fire is the signal! Cp9 goes into action!

programme.title: Luffy makes his long-awaited entrance, Iceberg has a shocking surprise in store for Robin, and the true identities of the masked assassins of CP9 are finally revealed!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Cp9 takes off their masks! Their shocking true faces!

programme.title: CP9 listens to Iceberg’s blood to learn the location of the blueprints, Usopp has another run-in with Franky and the remaining Straw Hats – plus a new friend – race to the rescue!
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: Luffy and the gang come face to face with Robin and her CP9 comrades. The rubberman is prepared to fight for his friend, but he’s never faced foes like this!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Come back, Robin! Showdown with cp9!

programme.title: Luffy, Zoro, and Nami are sent hurtling toward their deaths by the villains of CP9! Meanwhile, Usopp forges an unlikely friendship with Franky while waiting out a storm.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The straw hat pirates annihilated? The menace of the leopard model!

programme.title: Franky tries to convince Usopp that there’s no hope for the Going Merry, but the sniper – inspired by a mysterious moment from the past – remains loyal to his beloved boat
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The man who is loved even by his ship! Usopp's tears!

programme.title: A look back at Franky’s past reveals the amazing origins of the sea train – and paints a vivid picture of his younger days, spent alongside Iceberg and the legendary shipwright Tom!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Franky's past! The day the sea train first ran!

programme.title: Franky’s backstory continues! The sea train is a success, and it looks like Tom’s life is spared! Unfortunately, a government spy is searching for a reason to investigate Tom, and Franky provides the ammunition!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Spandam's scheme! The day the sea train shook!

programme.title: Tom does the unthinkable in an attempt to protect his apprentices, but young Franky is unable to control his rage, leading to a showdown with a spy – and a train!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The end of the legendary man! The day the sea train cried!

programme.title: The Crow, (1994, Action)
programme.desc: Visually stunning and action-packed, this hit movie, based on the comic book series, follows the return from the grave of a young rock guitarist who, along with his fiancée, is brutally killed by a ruthless gang of criminals.

programme.title: A.I. Artificial Intelligence, (2001, Science fiction)
programme.desc: In a future world, humans share aspects of their lives with companion robots called Mechas. But when an advanced prototype robot child named David is programmed to show unconditional love, his human family isn't prepared for the consequences.

programme.title: World War Z, (2013, Action)
programme.desc: World War Z is the fast-paced, pulse-pounding epic of the potential last days of the human race. Former United Nations employee Gerry Lane (Brad Pitt) is called in to help stop the pandemic that has spread around the world.

programme.title: Fast Color, (2019, Science fiction)
programme.desc: Hunted by mysterious forces and a local sheriff, a young woman with supernatural abilities flees back to her family—and unearths the depths of the power within her.

programme.title: The Spirit, (2008, Action)
programme.desc: In the vein of BATMAN BEGINS and SIN CITY, THE SPIRIT takes us on a sinister, gut-wrenching ride with a hero who is born, murdered and born again.

programme.title: The Crow, (1994, Action)
programme.desc: Visually stunning and action-packed, this hit movie, based on the comic book series, follows the return from the grave of a young rock guitarist who, along with his fiancée, is brutally killed by a ruthless gang of criminals.

programme.title: World War Z, (2013, Action)
programme.desc: World War Z is the fast-paced, pulse-pounding epic of the potential last days of the human race. Former United Nations employee Gerry Lane (Brad Pitt) is called in to help stop the pandemic that has spread around the world.

programme.title: Infinite, (2021, Science fiction)
programme.desc: Evan McCauley has skills he never learned and memories of places he has never visited. Self-medicated and on the brink of a mental breakdown, a secret group that call themselves Infinites come to his rescue, revealing that his memories are real.

programme.title: Twilight On The Rio Grande, (1947, Western)
programme.desc: Gene Autry's investigation of the murder of his partner, leads him to Mexico, where he becomes involved with the beautiful singer whose father has also been killed, and finds a jewelry smuggling ring.

programme.title: Loaded Pistols, (1949, Western)
programme.desc: Seeking a man who has killed his best friend in a poker game, Gene Autry finds a cowboy hiding from a posse. The young man's gun is the murder weapon yet Gene is convinced of his innocence.

programme.title: Buffalo Bill And The Indians, (1976, Western)
programme.desc: Buffalo Bill has fought Indians & Civil War battles, but nothing can prepare him for show business! When he signs Sitting Bull for a role in his Wild West Show, the clash of cultures reverberates far beyond the boundaries of their sprawling theater.

programme.title: The Ride Back, (1957, Western)
programme.desc: A lawman's grim duty and an outlaw's despair collide as Texas Marshal Hamish (William Conrad) must transport outlaw Kallen (Anthony Quinn) to face justice. But when Hamish is seriously wounded, which will Kallen choose: freedom or redemption?

programme.title: The Fighting Kentuckian, (1949, Western)
programme.desc: Leading a regiment of Kentucky riflemen during the War of 1812, John Wayne is the frontiersman who battles to save his love and his homeland from speculators, after the Battle of New Orleans.

programme.title: The Missouri Breaks, (1976, Western)
programme.desc: Marlon Brando and Jack Nicholson ignite the screen in this rousing story of a wealthy Montana rancher who hires a professional killer to track down a gang of horse thieves.

programme.title: Red River, (1948, Western)
programme.desc: John Wayne, Montgomery Clift and Walter Brennan give stellar performances in Howard Hawks' epic masterpiece as a self-made cattle baron (Wayne) and his adopted son (Clift) risk everything to drive their herd across the treacherous Chisholm Trail.

programme.title: The Alamo, (1960, Western)
programme.desc: John Wayne produces, directs and stars in this retelling of the Alamo, a battle in which 185 men joined together against an army of 7,000. Filmed entirely in Texas, "The Alamo" is a visually stunning and historically accurate celebration of courage.

programme.title: Big Jake, (1971, Western)
programme.desc: An aging Texas cattle man who has outlived his time swings into action when outlaws kidnap his grandson and wound his son.

programme.title: Flags of Our Fathers, (2006, Drama)
programme.desc: From Academy Award-winning director Clint Eastwood and Academy Award-winner Steven Spielberg, comes the life stories of the six men who raised the flag at The Battle of Iwo Jima, a turning point in WWII.

programme.title: We Were Soldiers, (2002, Action)
programme.desc: In 1965, America is at war with North Vietnam and Lt. Col. Hal Moore prepares his troops for one of the most violent battles in U.S. History: “The Valley of Death”.

programme.title: Tropic Thunder, (2008, Comedy)
programme.desc: Ben Stiller, Jack Black and Robert Downey Jr. lead an ensemble cast in 'Tropic Thunder,' an action comedy about a group of self-absorbed actors who set out to make the most expensive war film.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Usagi and the others try to figure out the identity of Chibi-Usa, the mysterious girl who fell from the sky.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Usagi and the others try to locate Ami and Rei. Seeing this, Mamoru's underclassman Ittou Asanuma demands to know Makoto's identity.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Minako sneaks into a channeling session to communicate with people in other dimensions and learns the channeler is Calaveras the Medium!

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Usagi and the others decide to go to the 30th century, where Chibi-Usa came from. Waiting for them there is the solitary Guardian Sailor Pluto.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Mamoru's future self, King Endymion, appears before Sailor Moon and her friends. He reveals a shocking fact about Planet Earth in the future.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Captured by Dimande, Usagi loses her transformation powers. Meanwhile, Chibi-Usa feels helpless and goes to see Sailor Pluto.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal

programme.desc: Sailor Moon and the others continue their search for Tuxedo Mask and Chibi-Usa. But Wiseman's covert maneuvers had already begun…

programme.desc: Sailor Moon and the others are stunned to learn Chibi-Usa's real identity is Black Lady. And finally, Wiseman's own identity is revealed.

programme.desc: Death Phantom radiates an enormous dark power. Sailor Moon and Sailor Chibi Moon take a stand and release the power of the 'Legendary Silver Crystal'.

programme.desc: Usagi and her friends' peace is short-lived when a strange phenomenon that turns people into monsters begins plaguing the city.

programme.desc: The Sailor Guardians defeat Eudial but, still suspicious of Mugen Academy, decide to check the place out again.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: The Three Outer Guardians risk their lives to contain Master Pharaoh 90 within the Sankakusu Delta and halt his attempt to become one with the Earth.

programme.desc: As Master Pharaoh 90’s power continues to grow, to protect her friends Super Sailor Moon decides to make the ultimate sacrifice.

Para não ser tolo, Mark embarca em uma missão para ver até onde Connie irá roubar seu dinheiro. Gêneros: Romance Elenco: Anna Chancellor, Samantha Barks, Ed Speleers, Rachel Hurd-Wood, Robert Kazinsky, Tony Way Diretor: Mark Murphy

programme.title: Projeto Pé Grande, (2021)
programme.desc: 2021. Um grupo de cineastas amadores decide embarcar em uma jornada nas florestas da Geórgia à procura do misterioso Pé Grande. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: Andy Goldenberg, Arnie Pantoja, Braxton Davis, Cameron Fife, Emily O'Brien, Kevin P. Farley, Mark Gagliardi, Nick Armstrong. Diretor: Ricardo Herrera

programme.title: O Trem-Bala, (2022)
programme.desc: 2022. Uma bomba é colocada durante a viagem inaugural do trem-bala mais rápido do mundo e explodirá caso a velocidade fique abaixo dos 322Km/h. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Anthony Jensen, Byron Preston Jackson, Carolina Vargas, Dylan J. Harris, Ryan Kim, Tom Sizemore, Zack Gold, Lesley Grant, Rashod Freelove, Ryan Youngwoong Kim Diretor: Brian Nowak

programme.title: O Ataque dos Tubarões, (2022)
programme.desc: 2022. Grandes tubarões brancos atacam um barco de pesca que se encontra a quilômetros da costa, obrigando os membros da tripulação a lutarem por suas vidas. Gêneros: Horror Elenco: Brad Worch Ii, Brandon Laabs, Francesca Shipsey, Jim Fitzpatrick, Jonathan Shores, Meghan Carrasquillo, Mike Rae Anderson, Paul Van Scott, Brad Worch II, Tara Phillips Diretor: Jadon Cal

programme.title: 1997. O avô de Stan está fazendo 102 e quer se matar, mas como não pode fazer isso sozinho, pede a ajuda de Stan. programme.title: 1997. Stan tem um novo cachorro chamado Sparky, que ao que tudo indica, é gay. Isso vira motivo de piada entre seus amigos. programme.title: 1997. Cartman conta para seus amigos sobre o seu sonho em que apareciam uns alienígenas que o abduzem e lhe introduzem uma sonda anal. programme.desc: South Park - T01E01

programme.title: 1997. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Isaac Hayes, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Eric Stough, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T01E02

programme.title: 1998. Cartman descobre a verdadeira identidade do seu pai. Uma tempestade de neve prende os garotos no hospital. A equipe do America’s Most Wanted está na cidade. programme.title: 2020. Naruto e o os outros ajudam Sazanami, que está ferido. Sazanami conta que ele tinha sido um ferreiro de espadas numa aldeia tranquila, mas foi incriminado por um assassinato realizado por Gosunkugi. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Caçar Ou Ser Caçado!?Decisão No Templo O.K..!
programme.desc: Naruto: Caçar Ou Ser Caçado!?Decisão No Templo O.K..! - T01E160

programme.title: 2020. Enquanto Guy e Lee não estão presentes, dois impostores vestidos como eles entram na Aldeia Oculta da Folha. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: O Aparecimento De Estranhos Visitantes - T01E161

programme.title: 2020. O País dos Pássaros está com problemas devido a um espectro conhecido como o Guerreiro Amaldiçoado, que muitos acreditam ser o fantasma do Senhor Owashi, o antigo senhor feudal que morreu de repente. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: O Guerreiro Amaldiçoado - T01E162

programme.title: 2020. Moso, o conselheiro do falecido senhor feudal, e Komei, o estrategista chefe, estão em desacordo. Neji começa a achar que o Guerreiro Amaldiçoado faz parte de um plano… Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: O Plano Do Tático - T01E163

programme.title: 2020. Komei está controlando o Guerreiro Amaldiçoado. Moso impede as ambições de Komei. A equipe da Folha está incerta sobre os motivos dele. Neji não quer se envolver, mas Naruto se opõe. Gamakichi e Gamatatsu são escolhidos para investigar. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Tarde Demais Para Ajudar - T01E164

programme.title: 2020. Tenten e Neji, sem outra escolha, ouvem Kakashi. Ele sente que eles estão sendo perseguidos. Komei foi declarado um criminoso e condenado à morte. O Guerreiro Amaldiçoado aparece e captura Komei. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: A Morte De Naruto - T01E165

programme.title: 2020. Sagi jura punir Moso. Naruto se lembra de Sasuke quando vê Sagi. Nem palavras ou Naruto vão impedir que Sagi siga o caminho da vingança. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Quando O Tempo Para - T01E166

programme.title: 2020. Na mansão de Moso, uma batalha acontece entre os Ninjas Errantes e um ninja da Folha. Com a ajuda de Chishima, Naruto escapa do genjutsu de Moso. Moso revela ser o líder dos Ninjas Errantes, Hoki! Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Quando As Garças Batem As Asas
programme.desc: Naruto: Quando As Garças Batem As Asas - T01E167

programme.title: 2020. Choji e Naruto querem muito o ramen especial de Ichiraku, mas descobrem que o restaurante está fechado. Teuchi revela que sua filha foi sequestrada por Ryonin, o Chefe Ninja, que está atrás de suas receitas secretas. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Misture, Estique, Ferva! Cozinhe, Panela De Cobre, Cozinhe!
programme.desc: Naruto: Misture, Estique, Ferva! Cozinhe, Panela De Cobre, Cozinhe! - T01E168

programme.title: 2020. O Demônio do Oceano está lançando o caos no País do Mar. Anko lidera um time com Naruto, Ino e Shino. É revelado que Anko possui uma história inesperada no País do Mar. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Recordações : A Página Perdida - T01E169

programme.title: 2020. Incapaz de encontrar Naruto, Anko fala com os oficiais do País do Mar. O barco levando os fundos do governo que deviam proteger parte no dia seguinte! Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: A Porta Fechada - T01E170

programme.title: 2020. Assim que acordou, Anko começa a lembrar da Ilha do Demônio, um lugar que ela visitou uma vez com seu sensei, Orochimaru. Anko revela a verdade por trás dos desaparecimentos e do segredo sobre o corpo de Isaribi. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Infiltração : A Armadilha! - T01E171

programme.title: 2020. Amachi e sua gangue começam o ataque contra o navio do governo. Naruto e os outros escapam da Ilha do Demônio, mas o que eles encontram é a frota do País do Mar à beira da aniquilação. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Desespero : Um Coração Partido! - T01E172

programme.title: 2020. Os ninjas da Folha e Amachi se enfrentam no mar. Com a ajuda de Naruto, Amachi é derrotado, mas um monstro aparece. Naruto invoca Gamabunta para derrotá-lo. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Batalha No Mar : O Poder Liberado!
programme.desc: Naruto: Batalha No Mar : O Poder Liberado! - T01E173

programme.title: 2020. Kunijiro visita Tsunade e escolhe Naruto para guiar seu garoto por um dia na vida de um ninja! Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Impossível!Arte Ninja: Jutsu Estilo Dinheiro! - T01E174

programme.title: 2020. Agari Kaisen, um amigo de Tsunade, pede a Naruto, Kiba, e Hinata que procurem um tesouro escondido. Achando ser uma tarefa fácil por terem um mapa, Tsunade ameaça mandá-los de volta à Academia, se falharem. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: A Caça Ao Tesouro Começa! - T01E175

programme.title: 2020. Depois de escaparem da caverna, Naruto e os outros vão atrás da clã Kedouin para impedir seu plano, mas a Aldeia Oculta da Folha já está sendo atacada. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Corra! Esquive-Se Em Zigue-Zague! Caçar Ou Ser Caçado!
programme.desc: Naruto: Corra! Esquive-Se Em Zigue-Zague! Caçar Ou Ser Caçado! - T01E176

programme.title: 2020. Naruto descobre que Jiraiya está aprontando algo. Jiraiya diz que está ocupado preparando seu manuscrito antes do prazo final. Naruto, impaciente e irritado, escreve seu próprio manuscrito para Jiraiya! Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Por Favor, Senhor Carteiro! - T01E177

programme.title: 2020. A Aldeia Oculta nas Estrelas pede à Aldeia Oculta da Folha para proteger uma estrela. A estrela, na verdade, é um meteorito que caiu 200 anos atrás, e dizem que ela possui poderes misteriosos. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Encontro! Um Menino Com Nome De Estrela
programme.desc: Naruto: Encontro! Um Menino Com Nome De Estrela - T01E178

programme.title: 2020. Naruto e os outros investigam o paradeiro da estrela roubada. O time suspeita alguém da Aldeia Oculta nas Estrelas porque o ninja que roubou a estrela usou a arte ninja da aldeia, Kujaku. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: A Inesquecível Canção De Ninar - T01E179

programme.title: 2020. Akahoshi, o ninja mascarado que sequestrou Sumaru, pretende usar Sumaru para chamar o ninja misterioso que roubou a estrela. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Jutsu Oculto! O Preço Da Arte Ninja: Kujaku
programme.desc: Naruto: Jutsu Oculto! O Preço Da Arte Ninja: Kujaku - T01E180

programme.title: 2020. O ninja mascarado e Naruto caem nas profundezas do vale. Ao tratar as feridas de Naruto, o ninja mascarado conta o motivo de ter roubado a estrela. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Hoshikage : A Verdade Enterrada - T01E181

programme.title: 2020. O corpo de Natsuhi é afetado pelos efeitos da estrela. Ela controla a estrela e confronta Akahoshi desesperadamente, mas Sumaru é levado como refém. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Reunião : O Tempo Restante - T01E182

programme.title: 2020. Sumaru sente a morte da mãe e foge furioso. Naruto é incapaz de pará-lo. Para salvar Sumaru, Hokuto e Mizura arriscam suas vidas para revelar a verdade por trás do treinamento com a estrela. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: A Estrela Radiante - T01E183

programme.title: 2020. Akamaru é ferido por um shinobi rival de outra nação. O shinobi usou uma habilidade de luta que espalha bactéria pelo corpo do oponente, infectando as capacidades mentais da vítima. Isso faz com que Akamura entre numa fúria incontrolável. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: O Longo Dia De Kiba - T01E184

programme.title: 2020. Uma misteriosa criatura se anexa a Naruto durante um treinamento na floresta. Tsunade começa a achar que é a criatura lendária chamada Onbaa. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: A Lenda Da Aldeia Da Folha: O Onbaa!
programme.desc: Naruto: A Lenda Da Aldeia Da Folha: O Onbaa! - T01E185

programme.title: 2020. Naruto e Shino recebem uma missão para providenciar segurança durante um funeral da família Kagetsu. Mas, eles logo percebem que a verdadeira missão é ajudar o filho mais velho realizar o estranho testamento do pai. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: O Risonho Shino - T01E186

programme.title: 2020. Uma fumaça preta e ameaçadora aparece sobre o País dos Vegetais, e de repente, um ninja misterioso ataca Choji e companhia. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Aberto Para Negócios! O Serviço De Mudanças Da Folha
programme.desc: Naruto: Aberto Para Negócios! O Serviço De Mudanças Da Folha - T01E187

programme.title: 2020. Ao interrogar Yurinoshin e Shun, a equipe da Folha aprende sobre a verdadeira identidade de Shun. Ela é a princesa Haruna, a única filha do senhor feudal do País dos Vegetais. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: O Mistério Dos Mercadores Atingidos - T01E188

programme.title: 2020. Naruto e os outros são atacados por Ruiga, o primeiro ninja maligno, que consegue tirar água da terra para usar como armas. Naruto logo descobre um jeito de ter a vantagem na batalha. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Um Ilimitado Abastecimento De Ferramentas Ninja!
programme.desc: Naruto: Um Ilimitado Abastecimento De Ferramentas Ninja! - T01E189

programme.title: 2020. Naruto é atacado de novo pelo segundo ninja maligno, Jiga. Jiga ameaça a vida de Naruto quando Hinata chega correndo para salvá-lo. Hinata consegue resistir as ameaças e começa a lutar! Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: O Byakugan Vê O Ponto Cego!
programme.desc: Naruto: O Byakugan Vê O Ponto Cego! - T01E190

programme.title: 2020. Renga confronta Naruto e Hinata. Declarando que já derrotou outros, ele avança e ordena a Naruto que lhe entregue a princesa. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Previsão: Morte! Céu Nublado Com Chance De Sol!
programme.desc: Naruto: Previsão: Morte! Céu Nublado Com Chance De Sol! - T01E191

programme.title: 2020. A princesa engordou por estar nervosa e quer que Ino finja de princesa para poder ir ao primeiro encontro com um príncipe que ela adora. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Ino Grita! Paraíso Da Gordura! - T01E192

programme.title: 2020. Lee abre um dojo por achar que não está treinando o suficiente. Ele espera que desafiantes venham ao dojo para lutá-lo. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: O Desafio Dojo!A Juventude Tem Tudo A Ver Com Paixão
programme.desc: Naruto: O Desafio Dojo!A Juventude Tem Tudo A Ver Com Paixão - T01E193

programme.title: 2020. A primeira-dama do País do Mel e seu cortejo desapareceram. Naruto, Kiba e Hinata vão numa missão e descobrem um castelo amedrontador no meio do caminho. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: A Misteriosa Maldição Do Castelo Mal-Assombrado
programme.desc: Naruto: A Misteriosa Maldição Do Castelo Mal-Assombrado - T01E194

programme.title: 2020. Durante a examinação médica de Lee, ele descobre que sua rede de chacra está muito prejudicada. Guy o leva para treinar na Academia para animá-lo. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: A Terceira Super Besta! - T01E195

programme.title: 2020. Procurando se vingar da morte de seu pai, Genho, a verdadeira identidade de Yagura e o mais velho dos irmãos Ryudoin, confronta Guy usando um jutsu distinto. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Confronto De Sangue-Quente: Aluno Contra Sensei
programme.desc: Naruto: Confronto De Sangue-Quente: Aluno Contra Sensei - T01E196

programme.title: Death Note - T01E06

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations - T01E85
programme.desc: 2018. Para conseguir sair da barreira, Boruto busca desesperadamente pelo coração de pedra, mas não o encontra. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Vagner Fagundes, Diego Lima, Robson Kumode, Diego Marques, Úrsula Bezerra, Lucas Gama, Luiza Porto, Mariana Zink Diretor: Hiroyuki Yamashita

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations - T01E86
programme.desc: 2018. Ohnoki leva Boruto a um lugar especial para explicar sua opinião sobre do futuro, opinião essa formada após a perda de Kozuchi, seu neto. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Vagner Fagundes, Diego Lima, Robson Kumode, Diego Marques, Úrsula Bezerra, Lucas Gama, Luiza Porto, Mariana Zink Diretor: Hiroyuki Yamashita

programme.title: Naruto: Um Novo Treinamento Começa! Eu Serei Forte! - T01E86
programme.sub-title: Um Novo Treinamento Começa! Eu Serei Forte!
programme.desc: 2020. Ferido mentalmente e fisicamente, Sasuke é levado à Aldeia Oculta da Folha por Guy. Mas a especialista médica, Tsunade, não está presente… Gêneros: Anime

programme.title: Naruto: O Treinamento Continua: Estoure O Balão Da Água! - T01E87
programme.sub-title: O Treinamento Continua: Estoure O Balão Da Água!
programme.desc: 2020. Naruto finalmente começa o treinamento com Jiraiya. A técnica que ele aprende é a marca do Quarto Hokage, um gênio que levou três anos para realmente controlá-la. Gêneros: Anime

programme.title: Naruto: Ponto Focal: A Marca Da Folha! - T01E88
programme.sub-title: Ponto Focal: A Marca Da Folha!
programme.desc: 2020. Naruto termina o primeiro passo do treinamento. Mas o próximo passo, fazer com que uma bola de borracha se exploda com chacra, torna-se ser extremamente difícil. Gêneros: Anime

programme.title: Naruto: Uma Escolha Impossível: A Dor Dentro Do Coração De Tsunade - T01E89
programme.sub-title: Uma Escolha Impossível: A Dor Dentro Do Coração De Tsunade
programme.desc: 2020. Orochimaru e Kabuto aparecem de repente diante de Tsunade e Shizune que estavam passeando. Orochimaru, ferido pelo Selo Ceifeiro da Morte do Terceiro Hokage, procura por assistência médica do prévio Sannin. Gêneros: Anime

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Impermanência - T02E60
programme.desc: 2008. Vovó Chiyo realiza o jutsu de ressuscitação em Gaara. Gaara acorda cercado por Naruto e os outros e também por uma multidão de ninjas da areia. Percebendo a verdade por trás do jutsu de ressuscitação, todos demonstram seu respeito por Chiyo. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Contato - T02E61
programme.desc: 2008. Gaara e seus salvadores retornam à Aldeia de Areia. Após visitar o túmulo de Vovó Chiyo, Naruto e os ninjas da Folha têm que partir. Deidara aparece ferido na frente de Zetsu e Tobi. Na Aldeia da Folha, alguém tenta infiltrar um garoto na equipe Kakashi! Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Companheiro De Equipe! - T02E62
programme.desc: 2008. Kakashi é hospitalizado devido à tensão causada por seu mangekyo sharinga. Apesar dos apelos de Shizune para enviar outra equipe, Tsunade afirma que enviará a equipe Kakashi para fazer o trabalho. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Hunter x Hunter - T03E02
programme.desc: 2013. O rei aguarda a seleção. Ele convoca mestres de shogi e go e os derrota. O próximo é uma garota cega chamada Komugi, campeã de Gungi. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Dlaigelles Silva, Vitor Mello, Wallace Raj, Gabriel Martins, Pedro Volpato Diretor: Hiroshi Koujina

programme.title: Hunter x Hunter - T03E03
programme.desc: 2013. À medida que as batalhas ferozes entre as Formigas Quimera e os Caçadores continuam, o Rei e a Komugi continuam a jogar Gungi. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Dlaigelles Silva, Gabriel Martins, Pedro Volpato, Vitor Mello, Wallace Raj Diretor: Hiroshi Koujina

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T03E29
programme.desc: 2016. Josuke é perseguido por um Stand e tem que andar de bicicleta a mais de 60 km/h para não ser pego. Ele tenta ligar para Koichi, mas ainda não é seguro. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T03E30
programme.desc: 2016. Kawajiri vai até o porão para confrontar um gato com um buraco na garganta, mas o encontra morto. No dia seguinte, uma planta estranha cresce na sepultura do gato. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: A Determinação Da Vovó Aposentada - T01E12
programme.desc: 2007. Pakkun acha o esconderijo dos akatsuki. A equipe kakashi e temari se preparam para resgatar, mas temari recebe ordens para ficar e ajudar a proteger a aldeia. Vovó chiyo se oferece para tomar o lugar de temari. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Um Encontro Com Destino - T01E13
programme.desc: 2007. A equipe kakashi encontra itachi uchiha, de quem sofrera uma amarga derrota no passado. Kakashi diz a todos para não olharem nos olhos sharingan de itachi. Kakashi se prepara para enfrentar itachi sozinho e pede que naruto dê cobertura. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: O Crescimento De Naruto - T01E14
programme.desc: 2007. Guy lamenta sua asneira ao ver seus três alunos presos pela prisão de água.determinado a parar kisame, guy o desafia usando o nunchaku, sua arma favorita. É um super taijutsu contra uma super força humana. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: A Esfera Secreta De Chama… - T01E15
programme.desc: 2007. Vovó chiyo e sakura salvam naruto do genjutsu de itachi.no mesmo instante, kakashi começa um contra-ataque. Uma batalha ninja de nível alto começa e kakashi exibe toda sua destreza e perício usando uma tática sutil. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: O Segredo Do Jinchurik! - T01E16
programme.desc: 2007. Seus inimigos derrotados, kisame e itachi, parecem ter sido clones, cujos poderes e aparecimento foram copiados por um jutsu de personificação. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: A Morte Do Gaara - T01E17
programme.desc: 2007. As equipes kakashi e guy fazem uma pausa.vovó chiyo observa naruto cochilar e lembra de sasori quando criança. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Postura Tática: Operação Entrada Em Gancho! - T01E18
programme.sub-title: Postura Tática: Operação Entrada Em Gancho!
programme.desc: 2007. As equipe kakashi e guy chegam ao esconderijo dos akatsuki. Eles correm para se infiltrar mas são parados por uma barreira de cinco selos. O único jeito de quebrar a barreira éremovendo os cinco selos de uma só vez. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Armadilhas Ativadas ... Os Inimigos Da Equipe Guy! - T01E19
programme.sub-title: Armadilhas Ativadas ... Os Inimigos Da Equipe Guy!
programme.desc: 2007. Quebrar a barreira de cinco selos ativa uma armadilha, e agora a equipe guy enfrentam cópias idênticas de si mesmos numa batalha.no esconderijo dos akatsuki, deidara e sasori lutam para se apoderar do jinchuriki de nove caudas. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Hiruko Contra Duas Kunoichi! - T01E20
programme.desc: 2007. Finalmente a luta entre avó e neto começa. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: O Verdadeiro Rosto De Sasori - T01E21
programme.desc: 2007. Vovóchiyo e sakura conseguem expor sasori, que incrivelmente não envelheceu nada nos últimos vinte anos.chiyo fica ainda mais chocada com o segundo boneco que sasori revela. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: As Habilidades Secretas De Chiyo - T01E22
programme.desc: 2007. Sakura é pega pelas táticas de sasori e fica cercada por uma nuvem de veneno. Mas ela usa uma papel bomba para se livrar da fumaçavenenosa. Ela resolver se arriscar a capturar sasori para forçá-lo a dar informações sobre o paradeiro de orochimaru. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Pai E Mãe - T01E23
programme.desc: 2007. A maior vantagem dos bonecos criados de humanos é que ele pode assumir o comando do jutsu que o humano usava enquanto vivo.consequentemente, o boneco do terceiro kazekage tem ahabilidade especial de converter chakra em poder magnético. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: O Terceiro Kazekage - T01E24
programme.desc: 2007. Sakura revida oataque da areia de ferro do boneco do terceiro kazekage com uma força sobre-humana. Ela aprendeu com tsunade que a habilidade mais importante de um médico ninja é se evadir um ataque. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Três Minutos Entre A Vida E A Morte - T01E25
programme.sub-title: Três Minutos Entre A Vida E A Morte
programme.desc: 2007. Sakura destrói o boneco do terceiro kazekage graças a um antídoto secreto que ela tomou. programme.sub-title: Luta Entre Marionetes: Dez Contra Cem!

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Um Sonho Impossível - T01E27
programme.desc: 2007. Embora tenha sido envenenada, vovó chiyo usa o últimoantídoto em sakura. Zombando da terna cena entre vovó chiyo e sakura, sasori tenta por fim à vida de vovó chiyo. programme.title: 2023. A gangue do duelista americano nº 1, Bandit Keith, sequestra Joey para uma caverna secreta com um cemitério como campo de jogo. Enquanto Yugi e seus amigos procuram por ele, Joey enfrenta monstros zumbis que ficam mais forte ao saírem de seus túmulos! Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T01E17

programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T01E18

programme.title: The Act
programme.desc: Gypsy fights for her life by defending her actions, while Mel and Lacey realize that behind closed doors things were not always as they seemed.

programme.title: Easy Land
programme.desc: A mentally ill Serbian architect tries to build a better future for her daughter in Canada. Starring Mirjana Jokovic, Nina Kiri, Daniel Kash.

programme.desc: A young man (Eric Balfour) and woman (Lauren Lee Smith) enjoy sexual compatibility but have trouble communicating and helping each other with problems. Starring Eric Balfour, Lauren Lee Smith, Don Francks.

programme.title: The Journals of Knud Rasmussen
programme.desc: European explorers change the lives of an Inuit community while exploring the Arctic in 1922. Starring Leah Angutimarik, Natar Ungalaaq, Peter-Henry Arnatsiaq.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: The search for Ashley puts Magnus, Will, Druitt and Tesla in the path of Kate Freelander, a con artist with ties to the Cabal who divulges the location of a secret facility.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Magnus demands information from Kate; Tesla and Henry try to create a weapon that can stop attacks on Sanctuaries without killing Ashley.

programme.title: Cairo Time
programme.desc: During a vacation in Egypt, an unexpected love affair arises between a magazine editor (Patricia Clarkson) and her husbands former colleague (Alexander Siddig). Starring Patricia Clarkson, Alexander Siddig, Elena Anaya.

programme.title: Ozzy
programme.desc: A lovable dog must rely on some new friends to help it break out of canine prison and get back home to his owners. Starring Jeff Foxworthy, Rob Schneider, Frankie Quiñones.

programme.title: Babe
programme.desc: An Australian farmer (James Cromwell) adopts a piglet that becomes a champion sheep herder. Live action/animatronics. Starring James Cromwell, Magda Szubanski, Hugo Weaving.

programme.title: Double, Double, Toil and Trouble
programme.desc: Determined twins (Mary-Kate Olsen, Ashley Olsen) try to trick an evil aunt (Cloris Leachman) out of a magic moonstone and save their family home. Starring Mary-Kate Olsen, Ashley Olsen, Cloris Leachman.

programme.title: Dennis the Menace
programme.desc: The comic-strip moppet (Mason Gamble) plays pranks on Mr. Wilson (Walter Matthau), the crotchety fellow who lives next door. Starring Walter Matthau, Mason Gamble, Joan Plowright.

programme.title: Charlie and the Chocolate Factory
programme.desc: A poor boy (Freddie Highmore) and four spoiled children win a tour through the incredible factory of an odd confectioner (Johnny Depp). Starring Johnny Depp, Freddie Highmore, David Kelly.

programme.title: Nancy Drew
programme.desc: Accompanying her father on a business trip to Hollywood, the young sleuth (Emma Roberts) investigates the long-unsolved death of a movie star. Starring Emma Roberts, Josh Flitter, Max Thieriot.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: An actual witch (Nicole Kidman) and a neurotic movie star (Will Ferrell) land the lead roles in a television remake of the 1960s sitcom. Starring Nicole Kidman, Will Ferrell, Shirley MacLaine.

programme.title: Rent
programme.desc: Artists, junkies and misfits in New Yorks East Village struggle with poverty, illness and the AIDS epidemic. Starring Rosario Dawson, Taye Diggs, Jesse L. Martin.

programme.title: The Couple Next Door
programme.desc: Evie and Pete move to suburbia with the dream of starting a family; but its not long before Evies dreams start to take a different shape -- that of her hot new neighbor, Danny.

programme.title: The Couple Next Door
programme.desc: The electric chemistry between Danny and Evie increases, amusing Becka and horrifying Pete; Dannys moonlighting takes a dangerous turn and Alans obsession with Becka grows.

programme.title: Gabrielle
programme.desc: A young woman who has Williams syndrome possesses amazing musical talents but struggles continually to gain her independence. Starring Gabrielle Marion-Rivard, Vincent-Guillaume Otis, Sebastien Ricard.

programme.desc: A 9-year-old Chinese girl (Phoebe Jojo Kut) and her older sister (Hollie Lo) embrace their experiences at a Roman Catholic Sunday school. Starring Phoebe Jojo Kut, Hollie Lo, Vivian Wu.

programme.title: Air Bud: Spikes Back
programme.desc: A dog that plays volleyball helps investigators solve a rash of mysterious crimes. Starring Rob Tinkler, Cynthia Stevenson, Katija Pevec.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Dr. Magnus and Druitt struggle to come to terms with the apparent death of their daughter; Will, Henry and Bigfoot must organize and process hundreds of surviving Abnormals.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: When a superhero begins to thwart crime in the city, the Sanctuary team must capture him to discover if he is an Abnormal.

programme.title: Miltons Secret
programme.desc: A man (Donald Sutherland) teaches his 11-year-old grandson (William Ainscough) how to cope with bickering parents and the neighborhood bully. Starring Donald Sutherland, Michelle Rodriguez, Mia Kirshner.

programme.title: Pride and Prejudice
programme.desc: A convoluted courtship begins between a young woman and the handsome, but less wealthy, friend of a rich bachelor. Starring Keira Knightley, Matthew Macfadyen, Brenda Blethyn.

programme.desc: A woman cooks for clients and tries to keep her thefts of food and money from being discovered. Starring Don McKellar, Seema Biswas, Lisa Ray.

programme.title: Fantastic Mr. Fox
programme.desc: After three nefarious farmers declare war on them, a sly fox (George Clooney) rallies his animal neighbors to fight back. Starring George Clooney, Meryl Streep, Jason Schwartzman.

programme.title: Independence Day
programme.desc: When alien invaders lay waste to planet Earth, its up to a select group of survivors to make a last-ditch stand. Fighting superior technology, mankinds best weapon is the will to survive. Starring Will Smith, Bill Pullman, Jeff Goldblum.

programme.title: The LEGO Batman Movie
programme.desc: There are big changes brewing in Gotham, but if Batman (Will Arnett) wants to save the city from the Jokers hostile takeover, he may have to drop the lone vigilante thing, try to work with others and maybe, just maybe, learn to lighten up. Starring Will Arnett, Michael Cera, Rosario Dawson.

programme.title: Shazam!
programme.desc: Billy Batson is a streetwise 14-year-old who can magically transform into the adult superhero Shazam simply by shouting out one word. His newfound powers soon get put to the test when he squares off against the evil Dr. Thaddeus Sivana. Starring Zachary Levi, Mark Strong, Asher Angel.

programme.title: Captain Phillips
programme.desc: In 2009, Somali pirates storm a U.S. container ship and hold Capt. Richard Phillips and his crew captive. Starring Tom Hanks, Catherine Keener, Barkhad Abdi.

programme.title: The Couple Next Door

programme.title: The Couple Next Door

programme.desc: A journalist and a political aide become entangled in a larger-than-life scandal. Starring Ben Platt, Mena Massoud, Nina Dobrev.

programme.title: Air Bud: Seventh Inning Fetch
programme.desc: The golden retriever joins a middle-school baseball team and searches for his missing offspring. Starring Kevin Zegers, Caitlin Wachs, Cynthia Stevenson.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Dr. Helen Magnus wakes to find the Sanctuary in ruins and the entire city decimated with no memory of how the devastation occurred.

programme.desc: Dr. Helen Magnus fights to save the life of one of the Sanctuarys research scientists who is attacked by a seemingly docile Abnormal; baffled by the creatures behavior, Henry tries to see what, or who, caused the Abnormal to react so violently.

Starring Joel Smallbone, Daisy Betts, Kirrilee Berger.

programme.title: Blizzard

programme.desc: When wealthy couple Ted and Corey are attacked by an intruder in their home in the middle of the night, robbery seems like the most likely motive; but a suspicious open window at the back of the house leads police in another unexpected direction.

programme.title: The Girl Locked Upstairs: The Tanya Kach Story
programme.desc: Feeling isolated and lonely, 14-year-old Tanya Kach befriends Tom Hose, a school security guard who lures her to his home. Held captive and abused for 10 years, Tanya eventually finds the courage to take a dangerous step toward freedom. Starring Robert Baker, Jordyn Ashley Olson.

programme.title: The Hands That Feed Us
programme.desc: Exploring the challenges of making a living as a modern Canadian farmer; how they sell their food and how little control they have over the process and price; from small scale to massive debt; from farmers markets to supply chain.

programme.title: Finally Caught
programme.desc: A woman goes missing in Dec., 2016; her abandoned car is found on a bridge.

programme.title: Targeted for Murder
programme.desc: When the Amish circle their wagons around a brutal murder amongst their own, investigators must dig deep to unearth the chilling secrets behind the simple facade of Amish country.

programme.title: Targeted for Murder
programme.desc: A carjacking murder is far more than it appears when police piece together surveillance videos and track the killer who parked the car and walked away.

programme.title: Targeted for Murder
programme.desc: When Jennifer Cave fails to show up at her new job, her family fears the worst; their fears are confirmed when they take their search for her into their own hands.

programme.title: One Way Mirror
programme.desc: Chelsea Bruck goes missing from a Halloween party; friends and family are devastated when police finds her remains over 6-months later; an exhaustive search of party goers lead authorities to Daniel Clay, a serial offender with a history of assault.

programme.desc: Michael believes hes being questioned about his involvement in a burglary, but the stakes are higher than he knows. A womans been found murdered in her storage locker, and Michael is the prime suspect.

programme.title: Urban Indie Film Block - Am I the Drama?
programme.desc: Are these the main characters or the villains of someone elses story?

programme.title: Downright Delicious With Yo-Yo - Small Bites and Kicked Up Cocktails
programme.desc: Yo-Yo lays out small bites that are packed with flavor; the menu is stuffed portobello mushrooms, BLT skewers with scallops and pesto, and the cocktail of the day is a blood orange Margarita.

programme.title: Downright Delicious With Yo-Yo - Simple and Delicious
programme.desc: Yo-Yo kicks things off with a penne pasta with spicy Italian sausage and a garlic tomato sauce; she shows off her skills with her version of fried rice, complete with eggs shrimp and more.

programme.title: Downright Delicious With Yo-Yo - Sunday Dinner
programme.desc: Yo-Yo lays out a Sunday dinner; its a homestyle recipe for slow-simmered short ribs and gravy served along with collard green and cabbage mix thats tender and well seasoned.

programme.title: Downright Delicious With Yo-Yo - Ladies First
programme.desc: For ladies night, YoYo makes buttery and delicious lobster rolls and doesnt skimp on the meat; she then takes it up a notch with a pan-seared salmon, drizzled with a creamy pesto sauce, served with a side of sauteed broccolini.

programme.title: Back to the Goode Life
programme.desc: A successful New York banker goes from being boss to being broke after she is wrongfully accused of unethical banking practices.

programme.title: My Other Mother
programme.desc: Adopted as a child, an anchorwoman (Essence Atkins) reconnects with her birth mother (Lynn Whitfield) and extended family when she attends the funeral of her father.

programme.title: Family Time - Forbidden Fruits
programme.desc: Tony gets a new client, who happens to be a very attractive woman; Lisa and Tony are struggling to complete a ten-day all juice diet.

programme.title: Family Time - The Help
programme.desc: Tony decides to hire an assistant, but Lisa is not happy with the attractive female candidates; Lisa insists Tony hire a male assistant.

programme.title: Family Time - Salt N Pepa N Spice
programme.desc: Lori hosts a charity event and calls on the girls from Salt-N-Pepa to perform; Lisa wants Tony to get a vasectomy.

programme.title: Family Time - Whats Ours Is Mine
programme.desc: Tony and Lisa go to couples counseling after arguing about a large purchase Tony made; Tonys father makes plans to come out of retirement and take over the business.

programme.title: Family Time - Troop Dad
programme.desc: Lisa agrees to host a baby shower but she finds herself overcome with shower plans; Tony is asked to take over as Ebonys troop leader.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Nerdy Mac
programme.desc: Bryanas standardized test scores prompt Bernie to send her to Jordans school, but she is so far behind that they threaten to move her back a grade.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Stone Nuts
programme.desc: Jordan tries to fit in with the popular crowd; after taking Bernies advice, he winds up losing his lunch money in a poker game.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Jack And Jacqueline
programme.desc: Wanda urges Vanessa to join an enrichment organization she once belonged to; they learn times have changed when Vanessa and her new friends are charged with shoplifting.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Manchild in Vanessa Land
programme.desc: Bernie learns Vanessa has a boyfriend, Rahim, who is 18 years old; when he discovers that the teen has a child, he hits the ceiling.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - You Dont Know Squad
programme.desc: Vanessa tries to increase her chances of being accepted into a college by joining the drill team, which pleases Bernie until he sees one of the squads provocative routines.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - California or Bust-Up
programme.desc: When Regina accepts a job in California, Steve must decide whether or not to move with his loved one.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - The Graduates
programme.desc: Steve looks forward to Romeo, Bullethead and Lydia graduating; Regina and Steve compete to secure a celebrity speaker for the commencement ceremony.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Back to School
programme.desc: Musician Steve Hightower becomes an inner-city music teacher.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Dead Dog Walking
programme.desc: When Bullethead (William Lee Scott) gets arrested, Steve (Steve Harvey) finds out that being a teacher doesnt end at 5 p.m.

programme.desc: Chef teaches viewers how to remake world-famous dishes and cocktails with a twist using local ingredients.

programme.title: Twisted Dish - Rice Remixed!
programme.desc: One of Americas favorite dishes becomes a five-star culinary smash when master chef Shular adds succulent lobster to fried rice, substituted with riced cabbage.

programme.desc: A male love expert attempts to use his methods to woo a female romance guru for a book, only to find he actually knows nothing about love.

programme.title: If You Really Love Me
programme.desc: The deceased mother of three women returns to Earth as an angel to help them rediscover what is truly important in life.

programme.title: Family Time - Air RNB
programme.desc: Tony and Lisa decide to turn their bedrooms into an AIR RNB but some issues arise.

programme.title: Family Time - Kissing Cousins

programme.title: Family Time - Bright Lights, Big Dusty House
programme.desc: Tonys mother comes over to help out now that Lisa has started a full time job; Donnie convinces tony to shoot an ad for his business.

programme.title: Family Time - What Happens After Vegas

programme.title: Family Time - Shes Got Game

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - The Rock
